mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_archive (student_id, file_type, file_name, file_url, upload_time, remark, status) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{fileType}, #{fileName}, #{fileUrl}, #{uploadTime}, #{remark}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM student_archive WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY upload_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalArchives, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS approvedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rejectedCount FROM student_archive
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM student_archive WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_archive WHERE status = #{status}
